title: helianthemum ovatum subsp. glabrum
intro: Helianthemum ovatum subsp. glabrum, also known as Rockrose, is a flowering plant species native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its pink or white flowers and woody stems. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions such as wounds, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Rockrose include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and providing relief from stress and anxiety, while also exhibiting potential anticancer properties. Traditionally, Rockrose is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
